sections.paragraph:
Ἀλεξανδρεύς, έως, ὁ an Alexandrian (Plut., Pomp. 645 [49, 6]; SEG XXXVIII, 219, 2; OGI index II; 3 Macc 2:30; 3:21; Philo, Joseph., SibOr; s. Preis. III 264 s.v.) of Apollos Ac 18:24 (on Jews as Ἀ. s. Jos., C. Ap. 2, 38, as in pap CPJ I p. 4). συναγωγὴ Ἀ. (Schürer II 76; 428, 445; III 92–94; 127–29) 6:9.

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

SEG SEG = Supplementum Epigraphicum Graecum—List 3

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

Preis. Preis. = FPreisigke, Wörterbuch der griech. Papyrusurkunden—Lists 4, 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

CPJ CPJ = Corpus Papyrorum Judaicarum—List 4

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 41
